SELECT c."Id", c."AddOnAmount", c."AddOnItems", c."AverageCalories", c."CalorieTarget", c."CancelAt", c."ClientId", c."ClientLocationId", c."CreatedBy", c."CreatedByAdminId", c."CreatedByName", c."CreatedOn", c."DeletedBy", c."DeletedByName", c."DeletedOn", c."EndDate", c."IsAutoRenewalEnabled", c."LastModifiedBy", c."LastModifiedByName", c."LastModifiedOn", c."LastStatusUpdate", c."LastSyncDate", c."ManualDiscountAed", c."MealPlanId", c."NextRenewalDate", c."PaymentDate", c."PaymentOrderId", c."PaymentQuickLink", c."PaymentStatus", c."PlanVariant", c."PreferredDeliveryTime", c."PromoCode", c."ProteinTargetG", c."RenewalCount", c."SelectedDeliveryDays", c."StartDate", c."StripeSubscriptionId", c."SubscriptionStatus", c."SubscriptionType", c."TotalCost", c."VatAmount", c1."Id", c1."AccountIsDeleted", c1."ActivationChangedBy", c1."ActivationChangedByName", c1."ActivationChangedOn", c1."ActivityValue", c1."BMI", c1."BMR", c1."BirthDate", c1."BlockOption", c1."BlockedOn", c1."BlockedUntil", c1."BodyFat", c1."ClientAllergicIds", c1."ClientSubscriptionId", c1."CreatedBy", c1."CreatedByName", c1."CreatedOn", c1."CurrentWeightInKG", c1."DeletedBy", c1."DeletedByName", c1."DeletedOn", c1."DietitianGoal", c1."Email", c1."FullName", c1."Gender", c1."HeightInCM", c1."ImageUrl", c1."IsActive", c1."LastModifiedBy", c1."LastModifiedByName", c1."LastModifiedOn", c1."Mobile", c1."NeededCaloriesToReachGoal", c1."NewGoalStart", c1."StripeId", c1."SubscriptionStatus", c1."TDEE", c1."TargetWeightInKG", c1."TimeToReachGoalInDays", c1."WeightInKG"
FROM "Client"."ClientSubscriptions" AS c
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT c0."Id", c0."AccountIsDeleted", c0."ActivationChangedBy", c0."ActivationChangedByName", c0."ActivationChangedOn", c0."ActivityValue", c0."BMI", c0."BMR", c0."BirthDate", c0."BlockOption", c0."BlockedOn", c0."BlockedUntil", c0."BodyFat", c0."ClientAllergicIds", c0."ClientSubscriptionId", c0."CreatedBy", c0."CreatedByName", c0."CreatedOn", c0."CurrentWeightInKG", c0."DeletedBy", c0."DeletedByName", c0."DeletedOn", c0."DietitianGoal", c0."Email", c0."FullName", c0."Gender", c0."HeightInCM", c0."ImageUrl", c0."IsActive", c0."LastModifiedBy", c0."LastModifiedByName", c0."LastModifiedOn", c0."Mobile", c0."NeededCaloriesToReachGoal", c0."NewGoalStart", c0."StripeId", c0."SubscriptionStatus", c0."TDEE", c0."TargetWeightInKG", c0."TimeToReachGoalInDays", c0."WeightInKG"
    FROM "Client"."Clients" AS c0
    WHERE c0."DeletedOn" IS NULL
) AS c1 ON c."ClientId" = c1."Id"
WHERE c."DeletedOn" IS NULL AND c."SubscriptionStatus" = 0 AND c."EndDate" < @__now_0

SELECT d1."Id", d1."ClientId", d1."ClientLocationId", d1."ClientSubscriptionId", d1."CreatedBy", d1."CreatedByName", d1."CreatedOn", d1."DailySelectionStatus", d1."Date", d1."DeletedBy", d1."DeletedByName", d1."DeletedOn", d1."DeliveryTime", d1."HasCutlery", d1."LastModifiedBy", d1."LastModifiedByName", d1."LastModifiedOn", d1."MealPlanId", d1."ReplacementDate", d1."TotalCalories", d1."TotalCarbohydrates", d1."TotalFats", d1."TotalProteins", c0."Id", c0."AccountIsDeleted", c0."ActivationChangedBy", c0."ActivationChangedByName", c0."ActivationChangedOn", c0."ActivityValue", c0."BMI", c0."BMR", c0."BirthDate", c0."BlockOption", c0."BlockedOn", c0."BlockedUntil", c0."BodyFat", c0."ClientAllergicIds", c0."ClientSubscriptionId", c0."CreatedBy", c0."CreatedByName", c0."CreatedOn", c0."CurrentWeightInKG", c0."DeletedBy", c0."DeletedByName", c0."DeletedOn", c0."DietitianGoal", c0."Email", c0."FullName", c0."Gender", c0."HeightInCM", c0."ImageUrl", c0."IsActive", c0."LastModifiedBy", c0."LastModifiedByName", c0."LastModifiedOn", c0."Mobile", c0."NeededCaloriesToReachGoal", c0."NewGoalStart", c0."StripeId", c0."SubscriptionStatus", c0."TDEE", c0."TargetWeightInKG", c0."TimeToReachGoalInDays", c0."WeightInKG", d3."Id", d3."AdjustedPrice", d3."BasePrice", d3."ClientId", d3."ClientSubscriptionId", d3."CreatedBy", d3."CreatedByName", d3."CreatedOn", d3."CustomMealId", d3."CustomeMealName", d3."DailySelectionId", d3."Date", d3."DeletedBy", d3."DeletedByName", d3."DeletedOn", d3."IsConsumed", d3."IsPaid", d3."LastModifiedBy", d3."LastModifiedByName", d3."LastModifiedOn", d3."MealId", d3."MealPlanId", d3."MealSelectionType", d3."MealTypeId", d3."PriceAdjustmentReason", d3."Qty", d3."SpecialInstructions", d3."TotalCalories", d3."TotalCarbohydrates", d3."TotalFats", d3."TotalProteins"
FROM (
    SELECT d."Id", d."ClientId", d."ClientLocationId", d."ClientSubscriptionId", d."CreatedBy", d."CreatedByName", d."CreatedOn", d."DailySelectionStatus", d."Date", d."DeletedBy", d."DeletedByName", d."DeletedOn", d."DeliveryTime", d."HasCutlery", d."LastModifiedBy", d."LastModifiedByName", d."LastModifiedOn", d."MealPlanId", d."ReplacementDate", d."TotalCalories", d."TotalCarbohydrates", d."TotalFats", d."TotalProteins"
    FROM "Client"."DailySelections" AS d
    WHERE d."DeletedOn" IS NULL AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM "Client"."DailyMealSelections" AS d0
        WHERE d0."DeletedOn" IS NULL AND d."Id" = d0."DailySelectionId" AND d0."MealId" IS NULL) AND d."Date" >= @__now_0 AND d."Date" <= @__AddDays_1
    ORDER BY d."Date"
    LIMIT @__p_3 OFFSET @__p_2
) AS d1
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT c."Id", c."AccountIsDeleted", c."ActivationChangedBy", c."ActivationChangedByName", c."ActivationChangedOn", c."ActivityValue", c."BMI", c."BMR", c."BirthDate", c."BlockOption", c."BlockedOn", c."BlockedUntil", c."BodyFat", c."ClientAllergicIds", c."ClientSubscriptionId", c."CreatedBy", c."CreatedByName", c."CreatedOn", c."CurrentWeightInKG", c."DeletedBy", c."DeletedByName", c."DeletedOn", c."DietitianGoal", c."Email", c."FullName", c."Gender", c."HeightInCM", c."ImageUrl", c."IsActive", c."LastModifiedBy", c."LastModifiedByName", c."LastModifiedOn", c."Mobile", c."NeededCaloriesToReachGoal", c."NewGoalStart", c."StripeId", c."SubscriptionStatus", c."TDEE", c."TargetWeightInKG", c."TimeToReachGoalInDays", c."WeightInKG"
    FROM "Client"."Clients" AS c
    WHERE c."DeletedOn" IS NULL
) AS c0 ON d1."ClientId" = c0."Id"
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT d2."Id", d2."AdjustedPrice", d2."BasePrice", d2."ClientId", d2."ClientSubscriptionId", d2."CreatedBy", d2."CreatedByName", d2."CreatedOn", d2."CustomMealId", d2."CustomeMealName", d2."DailySelectionId", d2."Date", d2."DeletedBy", d2."DeletedByName", d2."DeletedOn", d2."IsConsumed", d2."IsPaid", d2."LastModifiedBy", d2."LastModifiedByName", d2."LastModifiedOn", d2."MealId", d2."MealPlanId", d2."MealSelectionType", d2."MealTypeId", d2."PriceAdjustmentReason", d2."Qty", d2."SpecialInstructions", d2."TotalCalories", d2."TotalCarbohydrates", d2."TotalFats", d2."TotalProteins"
    FROM "Client"."DailyMealSelections" AS d2
    WHERE d2."DeletedOn" IS NULL
) AS d3 ON d1."Id" = d3."DailySelectionId"
ORDER BY d1."Date", d1."Id", c0."Id"

FROM "Client"."ClientSubscriptions" AS c
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT c0."Id", c0."AccountIsDeleted", c0."ActivationChangedBy", c0."ActivationChangedByName", c0."ActivationChangedOn", c0."ActivityValue", c0."BMI", c0."BMR", c0."BirthDate", c0."BlockOption", c0."BlockedOn", c0."BlockedUntil", c0."BodyFat", c0."ClientAllergicIds", c0."ClientSubscriptionId", c0."CreatedBy", c0."CreatedByName", c0."CreatedOn", c0."CurrentWeightInKG", c0."DeletedBy", c0."DeletedByName", c0."DeletedOn", c0."DietitianGoal", c0."Email", c0."FullName", c0."Gender", c0."HeightInCM", c0."ImageUrl", c0."IsActive", c0."LastModifiedBy", c0."LastModifiedByName", c0."LastModifiedOn", c0."Mobile", c0."NeededCaloriesToReachGoal", c0."NewGoalStart", c0."StripeId", c0."SubscriptionStatus", c0."TDEE", c0."TargetWeightInKG", c0."TimeToReachGoalInDays", c0."WeightInKG"
    FROM "Client"."Clients" AS c0
    WHERE c0."DeletedOn" IS NULL
) AS c1 ON c."ClientId" = c1."Id"
WHERE c."DeletedOn" IS NULL AND c."SubscriptionStatus" = 0 AND c."EndDate" < @__now_0

SELECT d1."Id", d1."ClientId", d1."ClientLocationId", d1."ClientSubscriptionId", d1."CreatedBy", d1."CreatedByName", d1."CreatedOn", d1."DailySelectionStatus", d1."Date", d1."DeletedBy", d1."DeletedByName", d1."DeletedOn", d1."DeliveryTime", d1."HasCutlery", d1."LastModifiedBy", d1."LastModifiedByName", d1."LastModifiedOn", d1."MealPlanId", d1."ReplacementDate", d1."TotalCalories", d1."TotalCarbohydrates", d1."TotalFats", d1."TotalProteins", c0."Id", c0."AccountIsDeleted", c0."ActivationChangedBy", c0."ActivationChangedByName", c0."ActivationChangedOn", c0."ActivityValue", c0."BMI", c0."BMR", c0."BirthDate", c0."BlockOption", c0."BlockedOn", c0."BlockedUntil", c0."BodyFat", c0."ClientAllergicIds", c0."ClientSubscriptionId", c0."CreatedBy", c0."CreatedByName", c0."CreatedOn", c0."CurrentWeightInKG", c0."DeletedBy", c0."DeletedByName", c0."DeletedOn", c0."DietitianGoal", c0."Email", c0."FullName", c0."Gender", c0."HeightInCM", c0."ImageUrl", c0."IsActive", c0."LastModifiedBy", c0."LastModifiedByName", c0."LastModifiedOn", c0."Mobile", c0."NeededCaloriesToReachGoal", c0."NewGoalStart", c0."StripeId", c0."SubscriptionStatus", c0."TDEE", c0."TargetWeightInKG", c0."TimeToReachGoalInDays", c0."WeightInKG", d3."Id", d3."AdjustedPrice", d3."BasePrice", d3."ClientId", d3."ClientSubscriptionId", d3."CreatedBy", d3."CreatedByName", d3."CreatedOn", d3."CustomMealId", d3."CustomeMealName", d3."DailySelectionId", d3."Date", d3."DeletedBy", d3."DeletedByName", d3."DeletedOn", d3."IsConsumed", d3."IsPaid", d3."LastModifiedBy", d3."LastModifiedByName", d3."LastModifiedOn", d3."MealId", d3."MealPlanId", d3."MealSelectionType", d3."MealTypeId", d3."PriceAdjustmentReason", d3."Qty", d3."SpecialInstructions", d3."TotalCalories", d3."TotalCarbohydrates", d3."TotalFats", d3."TotalProteins"
FROM (
    SELECT d."Id", d."ClientId", d."ClientLocationId", d."ClientSubscriptionId", d."CreatedBy", d."CreatedByName", d."CreatedOn", d."DailySelectionStatus", d."Date", d."DeletedBy", d."DeletedByName", d."DeletedOn", d."DeliveryTime", d."HasCutlery", d."LastModifiedBy", d."LastModifiedByName", d."LastModifiedOn", d."MealPlanId", d."ReplacementDate", d."TotalCalories", d."TotalCarbohydrates", d."TotalFats", d."TotalProteins"
    FROM "Client"."DailySelections" AS d
    WHERE d."DeletedOn" IS NULL AND EXISTS (

        FROM "Client"."DailyMealSelections" AS d0

    ORDER BY d."Date"
    LIMIT @__p_3 OFFSET @__p_2
) AS d1
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT c."Id", c."AccountIsDeleted", c."ActivationChangedBy", c."ActivationChangedByName", c."ActivationChangedOn", c."ActivityValue", c."BMI", c."BMR", c."BirthDate", c."BlockOption", c."BlockedOn", c."BlockedUntil", c."BodyFat", c."ClientAllergicIds", c."ClientSubscriptionId", c."CreatedBy", c."CreatedByName", c."CreatedOn", c."CurrentWeightInKG", c."DeletedBy", c."DeletedByName", c."DeletedOn", c."DietitianGoal", c."Email", c."FullName", c."Gender", c."HeightInCM", c."ImageUrl", c."IsActive", c."LastModifiedBy", c."LastModifiedByName", c."LastModifiedOn", c."Mobile", c."NeededCaloriesToReachGoal", c."NewGoalStart", c."StripeId", c."SubscriptionStatus", c."TDEE", c."TargetWeightInKG", c."TimeToReachGoalInDays", c."WeightInKG"
    FROM "Client"."Clients" AS c
    WHERE c."DeletedOn" IS NULL
) AS c0 ON d1."ClientId" = c0."Id"
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT d2."Id", d2."AdjustedPrice", d2."BasePrice", d2."ClientId", d2."ClientSubscriptionId", d2."CreatedBy", d2."CreatedByName", d2."CreatedOn", d2."CustomMealId", d2."CustomeMealName", d2."DailySelectionId", d2."Date", d2."DeletedBy", d2."DeletedByName", d2."DeletedOn", d2."IsConsumed", d2."IsPaid", d2."LastModifiedBy", d2."LastModifiedByName", d2."LastModifiedOn", d2."MealId", d2."MealPlanId", d2."MealSelectionType", d2."MealTypeId", d2."PriceAdjustmentReason", d2."Qty", d2."SpecialInstructions", d2."TotalCalories", d2."TotalCarbohydrates", d2."TotalFats", d2."TotalProteins"
    FROM "Client"."DailyMealSelections" AS d2
    WHERE d2."DeletedOn" IS NULL
) AS d3 ON d1."Id" = d3."DailySelectionId"
ORDER BY d1."Date", d1."Id", c0."Id"

Properties.commandText:
SELECT d1."Id", d1."ClientId", d1."ClientLocationId", d1."ClientSubscriptionId", d1."CreatedBy", d1."CreatedByName", d1."CreatedOn", d1."DailySelectionStatus", d1."Date", d1."DeletedBy", d1."DeletedByName", d1."DeletedOn", d1."DeliveryTime", d1."HasCutlery", d1."LastModifiedBy", d1."LastModifiedByName", d1."LastModifiedOn", d1."MealPlanId", d1."ReplacementDate", d1."TotalCalories", d1."TotalCarbohydrates", d1."TotalFats", d1."TotalProteins", c0."Id", c0."AccountIsDeleted", c0."ActivationChangedBy", c0."ActivationChangedByName", c0."ActivationChangedOn", c0."ActivityValue", c0."BMI", c0."BMR", c0."BirthDate", c0."BlockOption", c0."BlockedOn", c0."BlockedUntil", c0."BodyFat", c0."ClientAllergicIds", c0."ClientSubscriptionId", c0."CreatedBy", c0."CreatedByName", c0."CreatedOn", c0."CurrentWeightInKG", c0."DeletedBy", c0."DeletedByName", c0."DeletedOn", c0."DietitianGoal", c0."Email", c0."FullName", c0."Gender", c0."HeightInCM", c0."ImageUrl", c0."IsActive", c0."LastModifiedBy", c0."LastModifiedByName", c0."LastModifiedOn", c0."Mobile", c0."NeededCaloriesToReachGoal", c0."NewGoalStart", c0."StripeId", c0."SubscriptionStatus", c0."TDEE", c0."TargetWeightInKG", c0."TimeToReachGoalInDays", c0."WeightInKG", d3."Id", d3."AdjustedPrice", d3."BasePrice", d3."ClientId", d3."ClientSubscriptionId", d3."CreatedBy", d3."CreatedByName", d3."CreatedOn", d3."CustomMealId", d3."CustomeMealName", d3."DailySelectionId", d3."Date", d3."DeletedBy", d3."DeletedByName", d3."DeletedOn", d3."IsConsumed", d3."IsPaid", d3."LastModifiedBy", d3."LastModifiedByName", d3."LastModifiedOn", d3."MealId", d3."MealPlanId", d3."MealSelectionType", d3."MealTypeId", d3."PriceAdjustmentReason", d3."Qty", d3."SpecialInstructions", d3."TotalCalories", d3."TotalCarbohydrates", d3."TotalFats", d3."TotalProteins"
FROM (
    SELECT d."Id", d."ClientId", d."ClientLocationId", d."ClientSubscriptionId", d."CreatedBy", d."CreatedByName", d."CreatedOn", d."DailySelectionStatus", d."Date", d."DeletedBy", d."DeletedByName", d."DeletedOn", d."DeliveryTime", d."HasCutlery", d."LastModifiedBy", d."LastModifiedByName", d."LastModifiedOn", d."MealPlanId", d."ReplacementDate", d."TotalCalories", d."TotalCarbohydrates", d."TotalFats", d."TotalProteins"
    FROM "Client"."DailySelections" AS d
    WHERE d."DeletedOn" IS NULL AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM "Client"."DailyMealSelections" AS d0
        WHERE d0."DeletedOn" IS NULL AND d."Id" = d0."DailySelectionId" AND d0."MealId" IS NULL) AND d."Date" >= @__now_0 AND d."Date" <= @__AddDays_1
    ORDER BY d."Date"
    LIMIT @__p_3 OFFSET @__p_2
) AS d1
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT c."Id", c."AccountIsDeleted", c."ActivationChangedBy", c."ActivationChangedByName", c."ActivationChangedOn", c."ActivityValue", c."BMI", c."BMR", c."BirthDate", c."BlockOption", c."BlockedOn", c."BlockedUntil", c."BodyFat", c."ClientAllergicIds", c."ClientSubscriptionId", c."CreatedBy", c."CreatedByName", c."CreatedOn", c."CurrentWeightInKG", c."DeletedBy", c."DeletedByName", c."DeletedOn", c."DietitianGoal", c."Email", c."FullName", c."Gender", c."HeightInCM", c."ImageUrl", c."IsActive", c."LastModifiedBy", c."LastModifiedByName", c."LastModifiedOn", c."Mobile", c."NeededCaloriesToReachGoal", c."NewGoalStart", c."StripeId", c."SubscriptionStatus", c."TDEE", c."TargetWeightInKG", c."TimeToReachGoalInDays", c."WeightInKG"
    FROM "Client"."Clients" AS c
    WHERE c."DeletedOn" IS NULL
) AS c0 ON d1."ClientId" = c0."Id"
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT d2."Id", d2."AdjustedPrice", d2."BasePrice", d2."ClientId", d2."ClientSubscriptionId", d2."CreatedBy", d2."CreatedByName", d2."CreatedOn", d2."CustomMealId", d2."CustomeMealName", d2."DailySelectionId", d2."Date", d2."DeletedBy", d2."DeletedByName", d2."DeletedOn", d2."IsConsumed", d2."IsPaid", d2."LastModifiedBy", d2."LastModifiedByName", d2."LastModifiedOn", d2."MealId", d2."MealPlanId", d2."MealSelectionType", d2."MealTypeId", d2."PriceAdjustmentReason", d2."Qty", d2."SpecialInstructions", d2."TotalCalories", d2."TotalCarbohydrates", d2."TotalFats", d2."TotalProteins"
    FROM "Client"."DailyMealSelections" AS d2
    WHERE d2."DeletedOn" IS NULL
) AS d3 ON d1."Id" = d3."DailySelectionId"
ORDER BY d1."Date", d1."Id", c0."Id"

FROM (
    SELECT d."Id", d."ClientId", d."ClientLocationId", d."ClientSubscriptionId", d."CreatedBy", d."CreatedByName", d."CreatedOn", d."DailySelectionStatus", d."Date", d."DeletedBy", d."DeletedByName", d."DeletedOn", d."DeliveryTime", d."HasCutlery", d."LastModifiedBy", d."LastModifiedByName", d."LastModifiedOn", d."MealPlanId", d."ReplacementDate", d."TotalCalories", d."TotalCarbohydrates", d."TotalFats", d."TotalProteins"

    WHERE d."DeletedOn" IS NULL AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM "Client"."DailyMealSelections" AS d0
        WHERE d0."DeletedOn" IS NULL AND d."Id" = d0."DailySelectionId" AND d0."MealId" IS NULL) AND d."Date" >= @__now_0 AND d."Date" <= @__AddDays_1
    ORDER BY d."Date"

) AS d1
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT c."Id", c."AccountIsDeleted", c."ActivationChangedBy", c."ActivationChangedByName", c."ActivationChangedOn", c."ActivityValue", c."BMI", c."BMR", c."BirthDate", c."BlockOption", c."BlockedOn", c."BlockedUntil", c."BodyFat", c."ClientAllergicIds", c."ClientSubscriptionId", c."CreatedBy", c."CreatedByName", c."CreatedOn", c."CurrentWeightInKG", c."DeletedBy", c."DeletedByName", c."DeletedOn", c."DietitianGoal", c."Email", c."FullName", c."Gender", c."HeightInCM", c."ImageUrl", c."IsActive", c."LastModifiedBy", c."LastModifiedByName", c."LastModifiedOn", c."Mobile", c."NeededCaloriesToReachGoal", c."NewGoalStart", c."StripeId", c."SubscriptionStatus", c."TDEE", c."TargetWeightInKG", c."TimeToReachGoalInDays", c."WeightInKG"
